name: Temporal RGB Smear
description: Separates RGB channels in time with gravity wells, motion trails, audio reactivity, and temporal feedback.

params.name: Green Lag
params.description: Lag amount for the green channel

params.name: Blue Lag
params.description: Lag amount for the blue channel

params.name: Feedback
params.description: Temporal feedback amount for recursive smearing

params.name: Gravity Well
params.description: Strength of mouse gravity well and motion trail distortion
